articles.title: Get AMD's flagship Ryzen 7 9800X3D with 32GB of DDR5 memory and an MSI B850 Wi-Fi 7 motherboard at a discount — Micro Center bundles are now available on Amazon
articles.summary: Micro Center is now selling some of its bundles on Amazon, including this 9800X3D combo that gives you an excellent motherboard and fast RAM without breaking the bank.
articles.title_zh: 在亞馬遜上以折扣價購買AMD旗艦級Ryzen 7 9800X3D、32GB DDR5記憶體和MSI B850 Wi-Fi 7主機板——Micro Center套裝組合現已推出
articles.summary_zh: Micro Center現在在亞馬遜上銷售其部分套裝組合，包括這款9800X3D組合，提供優質的主機板和高速RAM，價格實惠。

articles.title: WD's 2TB Black SSD price drops by nearly 20% ahead of Prime Day sale — grab the 2TB SN7100 for $242.96
articles.summary: The WD Black SN7100 stands out for its high-end performance, low operating temperatures, and impressive efficiency. It is one of the few PCIe 4.0 SSDs that can compete with flagship drives while consuming noticeably less power.
articles.title_zh: WD Black SSD 2TB價格在Prime Day前夕下降近20%——以$242.96購買2TB SN7100
articles.summary_zh: WD Black SN7100以其高端性能、低運作溫度和卓越效率而備受矚目，是少數能與旗艦級驅動器相競爭的PCIe 4.0 SSD之一，同時功耗明顯更低。

articles.title: Apple @ Work: The era of legacy MDM is over, and declarative management is the new standard
articles.summary: Apple @ Work is exclusively brought to you by Mosyle , the only Apple Unified Platform. Mosyle is the only solution that integrates in a single professional grade platform all the solutions necessary to seamlessly and automatically deploy, manage, and protect Apple devices at work. Over 45,000 organizations trust Mosyle to make millions of Apple devices work ready with no effort and at an affordable cost. Request your EXTENDED TRIAL today and understand why Mosyle is everything you need to work with Apple . WWDC has come and gone once again, and there are a number of key updates coming to the IT world this fall. One note before we begin: now is the time to test your device workflows, apps, etc. Bugs that are reported early in the beta process are the ones that get fixed. With macOS 27 and
articles.title_zh: Apple @ Work：舊版 MDM 時代已終結，聲明式管理成為新標準
articles.summary_zh: Apple @ Work 由 Mosyle（唯一的 Apple 統一平台）獨家呈獻，提供單一專業級平台整合所有必要解決方案，可無縫自動部署、管理和保護工作中的 Apple 設備。

articles.title: Indie App Spotlight: ‘Brink’ brings a feature-rich experience to iPhone podcast listening
articles.summary: Welcome to Indie App Spotlight . This is a weekly 9to5Mac series where we showcase the latest apps in the indie app world. If you’re a developer and would like your app featured, get in contact . If you’re looking to level up your podcast experience, check out Brink . It’s a well made iOS podcast app with rich features, including a news tab, podcast summaries, trending podcasts, AI playlists, and much more. It’s also well made for iOS 26 and Liquid Glass, and feels right at home on the iPhone.
articles.title_zh: 獨立應用亮點：'Brink' 為 iPhone 播客收聽帶來功能豐富的體驗
articles.summary_zh: 本週的獨立應用亮點介紹 Brink，這是一款精心製作的 iOS 播客應用，如果您想提升播客體驗，可以查看該應用。

articles.title: Galaxy Watch 9 and Ultra 2 leaks reveal more changes, no Classic after all [Gallery]
articles.summary: Ahead of Samsung’s July event, new leaks are revealing a few more details about Galaxy Watch 9 and Galaxy Watch Ultra 2.
articles.title_zh: Galaxy Watch 9 和 Ultra 2 洩露揭示更多變化，最終無 Classic 版本 [相冊]
articles.summary_zh: 在三星 7 月活動前，新洩露的信息透露了有關 Galaxy Watch 9 和 Galaxy Watch Ultra 2 的更多詳情。

articles.title: Has your Pixel battery life improved after updating to Android 17? [Poll]
articles.summary: Whenever you install a massive new platform update on your phone, there are bound to be both intended and unintended consequences. One of the most critical factors is always longevity, which has us asking: Have you noticed y our Pixel’s battery life improve with Android 17?
articles.title_zh: 更新到 Android 17 後，您的 Pixel 電池續航是否改善？[投票]
articles.summary_zh: 在手機上安裝大型平台更新後，電池續航是最關鍵的因素之一，我們想了解您的 Pixel 在 Android 17 更新後電池續航是否有所改善。

articles.title: Weekly poll: what device do you use for gaming? A smartphone, tablet, PC or console?
articles.summary: The gaming market has had a rough go of it this decade – first COVID slowed down the rollout of the PlayStation 5 and Xbox Series X, then the crypto boom vacuumed up available GPUs, now AI has made RAM chips the new gold. This has led to smartphone makers rising prices, but PCs and consoles are just as affected – the PS5, the Xbox, the Steam Deck and the Nintendo Switch all got more expensive. And that’s just some of the more high-profile products. Services are feeling the pain too – Microsoft wanted to raise the price of Game Pass, but changed its mind after loud complaints from...
articles.title_zh: 每週投票：您使用哪種設備進行遊戲？智能手機、平板電腦、PC 還是遊戲機？
articles.summary_zh: 遊戲市場在這十年裡面臨多重挑戰，包括 COVID 延遲主機發佈、加密貨幣搶佔 GPU 和 AI 推高 RAM 晶片價格，導致智能手機、PC 和遊戲機價格上升。

articles.title: Weekly poll results: iOS 27 is okay, just okay
articles.summary: iOS 27 was met with a resounding “it’s okay” in last week’s poll. Okay, the sentiment among iPhone users actually leans towards positive, but most voters couldn’t work up enough enthusiasm for it to pick the “love it” option. To be fair, this release was focused on sanding off the rough edges of the major Liquid Glass redesign and on finally delivering on promises about AI features that Apple made a long while ago. Remember all the Apple Intelligence demos during the iPhone 16 launch? Yeah, Siri AI is launching later this year, likely alongside the iPhone 18 Pro models. Even if you...
articles.title_zh: 每週投票結果：iOS 27 不過如此
articles.summary_zh: 在上週的投票中，iOS 27 獲得了「還可以」的一致評價，雖然 iPhone 用戶的情緒偏向正面，但大多數投票者無法為其選擇「喜歡」選項。

articles.title: Deals: Samsung Galaxy S25 FE price drops again, OnePlus 15 and 15R, Nothing phones are on sale
articles.summary: Reminder: Prime Day is next week. You will need an active Prime subscription to get the lower prices, though the free trial usually works – unless you have already used it recently. This week, you don’t need Prime to get these deals. The Samsung Galaxy S25 FE stayed at MSRP for a few weeks after the launch of the Galaxy A57. Now the FE model is back where it should be – at just under $600 for the 8/256GB model. We have a detailed Galaxy S25 FE vs. A57 comparison article to help you choose between these two (though given that they cost the same, the choice is easy enough). ...
articles.title_zh: 優惠：Samsung Galaxy S25 FE 價格再次下降，OnePlus 15 和 15R、Nothing 手機正在特賣
articles.summary_zh: 提醒：Prime Day 下週舉行，需要有效的 Prime 訂閱才能獲得較低價格，本週無需 Prime 即可享受這些優惠。

articles.title: Samsung is now testing One UI 9 for the Galaxy Z Fold7, A56, S23, and S24 series
articles.summary: Samsung recently released the third One UI 9 beta for the Galaxy S26 series smartphones, which are currently the only smartphones eligible for the One UI 9 beta program. However, the Korean brand is already working on One UI 9 for the Galaxy S25 series, Galaxy A16 5G, Galaxy A17 5G, Galaxy A34, Galaxy A57, and the unannounced Galaxy S26 FE, and it has now begun testing One UI 9 for even more Galaxy smartphones. [#InlinePriceWidget,13826,1#] Samsung has started testing One UI 9 for the Galaxy Z Fold7, Galaxy A56, Galaxy S23, and the Galaxy S24 series. Samsung Galaxy Z Fold7 The...
articles.title_zh: 三星正在為 Galaxy Z Fold7、A56、S23 和 S24 系列測試 One UI 9
articles.summary_zh: 三星最近為 Galaxy S26 系列發佈了第三個 One UI 9 測試版，並正在為多款機型開發 One UI 9，包括 Galaxy S25 系列和多款 Galaxy A 系列。

articles.title: Motorola bumps up the storage on the Edge 70 Fusion
articles.summary: Motorola launched the Edge 70 Fusion in March, and so far it's been available in India with up to 256GB of storage. Now, however, the company has announced a new variant which pairs 12GB of RAM with 512GB of storage. [#InlinePriceWidget,14432,1#] The price for the new model is INR 36,999, which translates into about $391 at the current exchange rate. You can pick one up from Motorola’s online store in Pantone Silhouette, Pantone Blue Surf, or Pantone Orient Blue. The other specs have of course remained the same. So you get a 6.78-inch AMOLED display with a 144Hz refresh rate and...
articles.title_zh: Motorola 提升 Edge 70 Fusion 的存儲容量
articles.summary_zh: Motorola 在 3 月推出 Edge 70 Fusion，現已推出新的 12GB RAM 和 512GB 存儲版本，價格為 INR 36,999。

articles.title: Signal’s Meredith Whittaker wants you to remember that AI chatbots ‘are not your friends’
articles.summary: "These are not your friends. These are not conscious beings. These are not sentient interlocutors.”
articles.title_zh: Signal 的 Meredith Whittaker 提醒你 AI 聊天機器人「不是你的朋友」
articles.summary_zh: 「這些不是你的朋友。這些不是有意識的生物。這些不是具有感知能力的對話者。」

articles.title: In the Weights is your new AI-centric vanity search

articles.summary_zh: 那麼⋯⋯你的 In the Weights 分數是多少？

articles.title: Nobel laureate John Jumper is leaving DeepMind for rival Anthropic
articles.summary: Jumper isn't the only big name leaving Google DeepMind.
articles.title_zh: 諾貝爾獎得主 John Jumper 離開 DeepMind 轉投競爭對手 Anthropic
articles.summary_zh: Jumper 不是唯一離開 Google DeepMind 的知名人士。

articles.title: Gemini CLI vs. Antigravity: What works, not the spec sheet
articles.summary: Google has decommissioned its Gemini CLI, the open-source terminal tool that just shipped last year. It had over 100,000 GitHub stars and hundreds of contributors, and the replacement is Antigravity CLI, a closed-source Go binary you invoke with the command agy . As of June 18, the Gemini CLI stopped serving requests for free, AI Pro, and Ultra personal accounts. There is no grace period. If you’re on a personal plan, June 18 was the day the old tool went dark. Google’s pitch for the swap is built on three claims. To quote group product manager Dmitry Lyalin and principal engineer Taylor Mullen in the announcement : “Built in Go, Antigravity CLI is snappier and more responsive.” It runs “multiple agents for complex tasks in the background, letting you run large-scale refactors or research
articles.title_zh: Gemini CLI vs. Antigravity：實際運作情況，不只是規格說明
articles.summary_zh: Google 已停用其 Gemini CLI 開源終端工具（去年才發布，擁有超過 10 萬個 GitHub stars），並以閉源 Go 二進制檔案 Antigravity CLI 取代，透過 agy 命令調用。自 6 月 18 日起，Gemini CLI 已停止服務。

articles.title: Millions in Brazil Get Fake Government Mobile Alert After Hack
articles.summary: Brazil’s Integration and Regional Development Ministry and federal police are investigating an intrusion into the civil defense alert system that sent messages containing the word “misanthropy” to the mobile phones of millions of Brazilians.
articles.title_zh: 巴西數百萬人在系統遭駭後收到虛假政府手機警報
articles.summary_zh: 巴西融合與區域發展部和聯邦警察正在調查民防警報系統遭入侵事件,該入侵導致包含「misanthropy」字樣的訊息被發送到數百萬巴西民眾的手機上。
